examples: His bathroom is a brilliant pastiche of expensive interior design.
A talent for literary pastiche is the real strength.
There is of course, a big difference between Mr Ali's strategy-he called it "rope-a-dope" -and Mr Brown's pastiche.

The self-help section is an expansive pastiche, and within it are books both shallow and weighty.
